name: generate-image
description: Generate or edit images from a text prompt via one of two explicit backends — Google Gemini (gemini-3-pro-image, native SDK, with aspect-ratio / image-size / multi-image compose) or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (gpt-image-2, dall-e-3, custom base_url / api_key). Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, generate, draw, render, illustrate, or mock up an image, picture, illustration, concept art, storyboard panel, icon, logo, poster, or product shot — and also when they want to edit, res
author: FradSer
